product_name: Hot Wheels Mini Maker Kitz (16 Pack)

bullets: BUILD & RACE YOUR OWN CARS - With the Hot Wheels Mini Maker Kitz, kids can build and customise their own mini cars. Pop out the plastic parts, snap them together, and get ready to race with super-fast pull-back motors.
EASY SNAP-FIT ASSEMBLY - No scissors or glue required! This Hot Wheels Maker Kitz set is designed for easy assembly, making it perfect for kids aged 6-12.

TURBO PERFORMANCE - Each car in this Hot Wheels kit is equipped with a robust pull-back motor for turbo performance. Race them on any flat surface or combine them with your existing Hot Wheels track for the ultimate stunt experience.

COLLECT & TRADE - With 14 different cars to collect and build, this set offers endless fun and creativity. Kids can trade with friends and expand their collection, making it a perfect gift for young Hot Wheels enthusiasts.
PORTABLE FUN - Compact and lightweight, the Hot Wheels Mini Maker Kitz is perfect for on-the-go play. Take it to friends' houses, on road trips, or simply enjoy building and racing at home.
content.description: Mini Maker Kitz are the Hot Wheels Cars YOU build! Pop out the parts and build with superfast pull-back motor. There's 14 styles in the series to collect and they even work on Hot Wheels track! Build, Race & Collect Hot Wheels™ Maker Kitz! This set includes sixteen Mini Maker Kitz sets so you can share the fun with friends (styles may vary)!

attributes.whats_in_box: 16 x Mini Maker Kitz Racers (Assorted Styles)

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
